verses.text: “Job aw, Pasian' muhna-ah ka paubaang kei hi, na cih ding kilawmlo hi
Pasian kiangah, ka khialh hangin bang phamawh sa na hi hiam? Khialhna ka gamtatloh manin bangmah phattuamna ka ngah kei hi, na cih ding kilawmlo hi
Nang leh na lawmte tungah thu ka hong gen ding hi
“Vantung ento dih un. Meiite bangzah takin sang omto ahi hiam
Mawhna na gamtat manin, Pasian bangmah sukhalo hi. Tampi tak khial talecin zong amah sukha tuan ahi hiam
Na thumanna hangin Pasian in phattuamna ngah ahi hiam? Pasian in nang kiang panin bangmah deihlo hi
Na khialhna hangin na mipihte bek in thuak a, na gamtat hoihna hangin na mipihte bek in phattuamna ngah hi
“Mite in gim a thuak ciangin tau uh a, amaute a honkhia dingin midang khatpeuh a sam uh hi
Lungzin' hun laitakin thahatna a pia, amaute a Piangsak Pasian' lam ngalo uh hi
Eite mipilin a hong bawl, ganhingte leh vasate sangin a pilzaw-in a hong bawl Pasian' lam ngalo uh hi
Amaute migilo mi kihisakte ahih manun, huh ding a nget hangun Pasian in pialo hi
Ngetnget, gengen, a phattuamna bangmah omlo hi. Vanglian Pasian in na mulo, na ngailo hi
“Job aw, nangmah in, ‘Pasian ka mu thei kei a, ahi zongin ka thu ama khutsungah om a, lungduai takin ka ngak niloh hi,’ na ci hi
Pasian in kuamah gim pialo a, khialhna zong thupi ngaihsutlo hi, ci-in na ngaihsun hi
Tua banga kam na paupau a mawknapi hi a, na gen mel zong a thei hetlo na hihna thu a hong kilangsak na hi hi,” a ci hi.
